spec_match.rationale: Perfect representation of action values and target_hint rules.

interactive.rationale: Allows selecting self vs blank, toggling prerender vs prefetch, and outputs correctly structured speculation rules.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly matches target_hint explanations and Chromium motivations.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully detects speculation rules feature support in the browser.

summary: Clean interactive target hint builder showing the relationship between anchors and speculation properties.
